description: Oracle Analytics Desktop is open on the Windows desktop. Using the 'SAMPLE_ORDER_LINES' dataset (available in the application or at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\sample_order_lines.xlsx), create a new workbook featuring a Treemap visualization. Configure the treemap hierarchy to group by 'Product Category' and then 'Product Sub Category', with rectangle sizes determined by 'Revenue'. You may optionally color the visualization by 'Revenue' or 'Profit'. Save the workbook as 'revenue_treemap' to C:\Users\Docker\Documents.
